yugen-modifiers.settings.debug-mode.name: Debug Mode
yugen-modifiers.settings.debug-mode.hint: Enable detailed logs for dice modifier parsing.
yugen-modifiers.settings.tooltip-delay.h: The delay in milliseconds before the floating breakdown tooltip is displayed.
Allow pinning the tooltip on the screen by holding Shift or Ctrl when moving the mouse away.
yugen-modifiers.settings.enable-token-ho: Display a floating UI listing the active conditions, concentration, and temporary effects of a token when hovering over it.
yugen-modifiers.settings.show-non-physic: Display unarmed strikes, natural attacks, and spell action weapons in the hover tooltip. Disabling this prevents metagaming.
yugen-modifiers.settings.show-equipped-a: Display equipped armor and shields in the token hover tooltip. Disabling this prevents metagaming.
yugen-modifiers.settings.hide-token-name: Hide the name of the hovered token in the tooltip header to prevent players from identifying unnamed targets.
yugen-modifiers.settings.show-token-race: Display the actor race or ancestry in the tooltip header if available.
yugen-modifiers.settings.enable-health-c: Display the descriptive health condition status of the target in the tooltip header.
yugen-modifiers.settings.health-label-10: Status text displayed when the token has full HP.
yugen-modifiers.settings.health-label-75: Status text displayed when the token HP is between 75% and 99%.
yugen-modifiers.settings.health-label-50: Status text displayed when the token HP is between 50% and 74%.
yugen-modifiers.settings.health-label-25: Status text displayed when the token HP is between 25% and 49%.
yugen-modifiers.settings.health-label-10: Status text displayed when the token HP is between 1% and 24%.
Status text displayed when the token HP is 0%.
yugen-modifiers.settings.enable-token-co: Enable the dynamic token image configuration system based on equipped items.
yugen-modifiers.equip-tokens.title: yugen-modifiers
yugen-modifiers.equip-tokens.subtitle: When this actor modifies their item by equipping/unequipping, you can change their token dynamically.
yugen-modifiers.equip-tokens.warnings.no: Please select exactly one token to open the yugen-modifiers UI.
You do not own the selected token.
